Flex4,Flex2,Flex1,Flex3

Update TransX set Co = 'JE', GL = 'JE', Gldesc = substring(Flex8,1,50), SubProd = 'OS JE', Flex5 = '99 OS JE',  TTY = '', TP = '', BusCat = '', Amt2 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Division is NULL and SubProd is NULL

Update TransX set Co = 'JE', GL = 'JE', Gldesc = substring(Flex8,1,50), Flex5 = '00 BBal',  TTY = '', TP = '', BusCat = '', Amt2 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Division is NULL and SubProd = 'PYE OS JE'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex9, Co, GL, FSitem, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Flex9, Co, GL, FSitem, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, -Amt1, '99 OS JE' as Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'PYE OS JE')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex9, Co, GL, FSitem, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Flex9, Co, GL, FSitem, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt2, '' as Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co <> 'JE')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '00 BBal' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '00 BBal' and Flex9 <> '1' and Co  <>  'JE'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set  TTY = '990' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY like '99%'

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TP = c.TP_From and len(c.TP_From) = 5 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  TP = 'FFH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP like 'F%'
update TransX set  TP = 'ODY' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TP in ('','FFH')
update TransX set SubProd = 'TX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = '' and Co like '599%'
update TransX set SubProd = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%' and not Co = 'JE'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat,SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, 'missing' as Flex2, Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, FSitem, Flex1, Flex5, Flex9)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update x set Co = y.Field1, SubProd = 'G23' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Co' and y.Descr = x.Co where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex9 > '1'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '09 Bulk & DAH' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 in ('2','3'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '08 Interim Cash' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('132') and Flex9 = '4')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '07 Payables' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('221') and Flex9 = '4')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '07 Payables' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('132','221') and Flex9 = '4')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '07 Payables' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 = '5')
update TransX set Flex5 = '01 IFRS-4'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co < '5990' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '03 FFH TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FFH' and SubProd = 'G23' and Flex5 <> '00 BBal'
update TransX set Flex5 = '03 FFH TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G24' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '04 ODY TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2999','3999') and SubProd= 'G23' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '04 ODY TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'ODY' and SubProd= 'G23' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '04 ODY TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '44155%' and SubProd= 'G23' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '04 ODY TP'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G25' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '06 FH'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd in ('G23','G26') and substring(GL,1,3) in ('441','x682') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '06 FH'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('16','24') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '10 WH/Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and GL = '2880000' and TTY = '803' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '07 Payables'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('22') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '07 Payables'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('149') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '07 Payables'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,4) in ('2829') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '08 Interim Cash'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('132','135','232') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '08 Interim Cash'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,4) in ('2822') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('133','134','137','139','239') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd in ('G26') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '02 RI'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd in ('G23','G29','RI') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = SubProd  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '02 RI'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '05 Other' and GL in ('1099917','2851017')
update TransX set Flex5 = '06 FH'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 in ('02 RI','05 Other') and GL in ('3572102','3572202','3591002','4397002','4398007','4398010')
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and GL in ('2310003','4398014')
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and TTY = '809'
update TransX set Flex5 = '02 RI FX'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'RI FX'
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 Other'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and TTY = '815' and SubProd in ('G23','G26')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G26' and Flex5 = '05 Other' and GL in ('3590702','3590802','3592502','4398004','4398005'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '07 Payables' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G26' and Flex5 = '05 Other' and GL in ('3590702','3590802','3592502','4398004','4398005'))
update TransX set Flex5 = '07 Payables'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '05 Other' and GL in ('3590702','3590802','3592502','4398004','4398005')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G26' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, 'translate' as Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and Flex5 in ('07 Payables','08 Interim Cash','09 Bulk & DAH','10 WH/Other'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G26' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '05 Other' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 = 'translate')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and Flex5 = '07 Payables' and GL in ('3590702','3590802','3592502','4398004','4398005'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G26' as SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '07 Payables' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and Flex5 = '07 Payables' and GL in ('3590702','3590802','3592502','4398004','4398005'))

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('2853500','2851017') and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017') and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017') and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Other' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL = m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900') and Assgnmt is NULL and Flex9 = 'translate'

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900') and Assgnmt is NULL and Flex9 = 'translate'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '1) RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G26' and (GL = '1099917' or GL = '2851017' or substring(GL,1,4) in ('3572','3590','3591','3592','4398')) and Flex5 = '4) Other')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G26' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '4) Other' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G26' and (GL = '1099917' or GL = '2851017' or substring(GL,1,4) in ('3572','3590','3591','3592','4398')) and Flex5 = '4) Other')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '05 Other' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '01 IFRS-4' and GL = '1399998'  and TP = 'FFH' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' < '2023-06-01')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '01 IFRS-4' and GL = '1399998'  and TP = 'FFH' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' < '2023-06-01')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600052' as GL, '' as TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '10 WH/Other' and GL = '2880000' and SubProd = 'G23')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600052' as GL, '' as TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '05 Other' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '10 WH/Other' and GL = '2880000' and SubProd = 'G23')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '05 Other' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and GL = '4099998'  and not TP = 'FFH')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, 'G23' as SubProd, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5, Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and GL = '4099998'  and not TP = 'FFH')
update TransX set TTY = '100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(TTY,'') = '' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','156','215','216')
update TransX set TTY = '100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '805' and GL = '1560002'

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY = c.TTY and t.BusCat = c.BC_From and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (t.TP = 'ODY' and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M25')

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY = c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (t.TP = 'ODY' and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY like c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (t.TP = 'ODY' and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY like c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = '' and c.TP_From = 'O' and t.GL = '2879901') where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY like c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'O' and t.GL = '3572102') where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and c.TTY = '990' and substring(t.GL,4,3) = '999' and t.BusCat = c.BC_From and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (t.TP = 'ODY' and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and c.TTY = '990' and substring(t.GL,4,3) = '999' and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (t.TP = 'ODY' and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP = 'FFH' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(GL,1,1) in ('4','5') and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284')
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('46','56')
update t set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update t set Flex2 = m.MapKey from TransX t inner join MapKeyRanges m on t.Fsitem >= m.FromGL and t.Fsitem <= m.ThruGL and m.MapKey like 'O1-%' and len(m.MapKey) = 7 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update t set Flex3 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex2 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, 'fill' as Co, 'fill' as GL, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, '' as SubProd, 0 as Amt1, 'fill' as FSitem, 'fill' as Flex1, MapKey as Flex2, Name as Flex3 from MapKeys where MapKey like 'O1-%' and len(MapKey) = 7 and not MapKey in (select distinct Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'))
update t set Flex4 = substring(t.Flex2,4,1) + ') ' + m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on substring(t.Flex2,1,4) = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set Flex1 = y.OS_GL_Desc from TransX x inner join (Select OS_GL,min(OS_GL_Desc) as OS_GL_Desc from osAccountMap3 group by OS_GL) y on x.Fsitem = y.OS_GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = substring(Flex2,6,2) + ') ' + Flex3 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Fsitem + ' ' + Flex1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = GL + ' ' + GLdesc where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select '[batchID]', '5990' as Co, '777' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, 'G26' as SubProd, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '2056' as FSitem, '2056 A/P - other (over $ must be explained)' as Flex1, '01) Accounts Payable and Accrued Liabilities' as Flex2, '1099917 Suspense Cash - IFRS17' as Flex3, '2) Liabilities' as Flex4, '02 RI' as Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, round(-Amt1,2), FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, '05 Other' as Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '02 RI' and TTY = '777' and Flex3 like '1099917%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1, Flex2) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Field1 as Flex1, Descr as Flex2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'SubPro')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Flex2 = '99) unassigned'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex9, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
